name: Spaced Algos
short_description: Spaced repetition platform for mastering coding problems
description: I built Spaced Algos because I kept forgetting LeetCode problems between sessions, the classic grind-and-forget cycle. It uses a custom spaced repetition algorithm to schedule reviews at algorithmically optimized intervals based on your recall performance, so you actually build long-term memory instead of re-learning the same problems from scratch. Built with Next.js and Supabase, it includes Google OAuth, a repetition calendar, streak tracking, and a progress dashboard.

name: AI Music Generator
short_description: Full-stack platform for real-time AI-powered music generation
description: A full-stack AI music platform I built with a team of 6 for my senior capstone. Users type a text prompt and the platform generates original music across 4 different AI models simultaneously, with real-time chord analysis displayed as the music plays. I led frontend development and built the Flask/MongoDB backend to serve data to the Next.js interface.

name: Avatar Dealer
short_description: Unreal Engine 5 project enhancing avatar interactions using AI
description: An R&D prototype I built during my internship at Aristocrat, exploring what it would take to make a casino dealer avatar feel genuinely realistic in real time. The core challenge was stitching together a full voice pipeline: player speech goes in, gets transcribed, fed to an LLM, and converted back to synthesized speech, all with lip-sync animation driven by NVIDIA Omniverse. Built in Unreal Engine 5 using Python to integrate the AI models.

name: Mobile Loyalty App
short_description: Proof-of-concept loyalty app with NFC and mobile wallet integration
description: A proof-of-concept loyalty app I built during my first internship at Aristocrat, exploring NFC-based connections between mobile wallet passes and entertainment hardware. The idea was that a player could tap their phone to link a digital loyalty pass. Built cross-platform for iOS and Android using Angular and Electron, with Python scripts to automate wallet pass generation for testing.
